recommendations.title: Assassination of a High School President
recommendations.overview: After the theft of copies of SAT exams from a principal's office, teenage reporter Bobby Funke sets out to unmask the thief.

recommendations.title: National Lampoon Presents Dorm Daze
recommendations.overview: When a foreign-exchange student and a hooker - both named Dominique - show up on a college campus, the unsuspecting student body is in for the education of a lifetime!

recommendations.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
recommendations.overview: Blonde, bouncy Buffy is your typical high school cheerleader. But all that changes when a strange man informs her she's been chosen by fate to kill vampires.

recommendations.title: Terri
recommendations.overview: Terri, a pajama-clad, disaffected high school student learns how to engage the world with the help of Mr. Fitzgerald, his assistant principal.

recommendations.title: Tuttapposto
recommendations.overview: Roberto is a student in a corrupt university where teachers sell exams and only hire friends and relatives.

recommendations.title: Love Don't Co$t a Thing
recommendations.overview: A high school outcast pays a cheerleader to pose as his girlfriend so he can be considered cool.

recommendations.title: Trick 'r Treat
recommendations.overview: Four interwoven stories that occur on Halloween: an everyday high school principal has a secret life as a serial killer; a college virgin might have just met the one guy for her; a group of teenagers pull a mean prank, and a bitter old recluse receiv

recommendations.title: Elling
recommendations.overview: 40-year-old Elling, sensitive, would-be poet, is sent to live in a state institution when his mother, who has sheltered him his entire life, dies. There he meets Kjell Bjarne, a gentle giant and female-obsessed virgin, also in his 40s.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: The Teacher
recommendations.overview: The principal of an elementary school calls a special parents meeting after it’s alleged that the seemingly empathetic and kindly-looking teacher Mrs. Drazděchová uses her students to manipulate their parents.
